text:
Nine days of "verification in progress" with deposits blocked is a long wait, and I understand wanting to know if it's stuck. I don't have visibility into the specific hold-up on your document from here, so I can't confirm what's causing the delay.

I'm routing this to our KYC team to review your submission and unblock the deposit issue if there's a fix needed on our end. They'll follow up with next steps.

Novig Support
